text:
PUMPKIN SPICE  (printed label, left)
- 4 cups water
- 3 cups sugar
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 2 tsp cinnamon
- 1 tsp ginger
- 1 tsp clove
- 1 tsp nutmeg
- 6 oz pumpkin

- vanilla

MIXED BERRY

- 10.5 oz sugar

CANDIED CRANBERRIES

Toss in 1/2 cups of sugar
